name: Canvas2D Top-down Racing
description: Reusable, config-driven top-down time-trial racing: the whole track is shown at once, drive a car with heading-based physics around a JSON tile track through ordered checkpoints for a number of laps, against the clock (total time + best lap). Off-track grass slows the car; walls stop it. No AI opponents in v1. Procedural fallback graphics; standalone browser export.
capabilities: fixed full-track top-down view from a JSON tile map ('#' wall, '.' road, other = grass)
heading-based car physics: accelerate, brake/reverse, speed-scaled steering, coasting friction
surface effects: grass caps speed, walls stop the car
ordered checkpoints (index 0 = start/finish) and multi-lap races
lap timer, total time and best-lap tracking
time trial (no AI opponents in v1)
standalone export (relative paths, no server calls)
constraints: vanilla HTML/CSS/JS only — no Node, npm or frameworks
configuration-driven: generators produce JSON matching schema.json, never runtime code
relative asset paths only; a missing car sprite falls back to a procedural drawing
no AI opponents and no scrolling camera in v1
